zh.lifeSummary: 當Katharina von Jülich於1255年出生在爾利時，她的父親Wilhelm IV. von Jülich40歲，母親Ricarda von Geldern34歲。她於1269年與Johann von Arenberg在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫迪倫爾利結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1286年在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 阿維利阿波格享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katharina von Jülich于1255年出生在爾利时，她的父亲Wilhelm IV. von Jülich40岁，母亲Ricarda von Geldern34岁。她于1269年与Johann von Arenberg在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫迪倫爾利结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1286年在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 阿維利阿波格享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Jülich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto.

variants.name: Juhl
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Arno, Erwin, Heinz, Kurt.

Danish and Norwegian: nickname for someone who was born on Christmas Day or had some other connection with this time of year, from Old Norse jól. This was originally the name of a pagan midwinter festival, which was later appropriated by the Christian Church for celebration of the birth of Christ.
German (of Slavic origin): nickname or topographic name from a Germanized Slavic stem gol ‘naked, barren’.

nameMeanings.name: Katharina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Katharina von Jülich was born in 1255, in Jülich, her father, Wilhelm IV. von Jülich, was 40 and her mother, Ricarda von Geldern, was 34. She married Johann von Arenberg in 1269, in Jülich, Düren, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1286, in Aremberg, Ahrweiler, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katharina von Jülich est née en 1255, à Jülich, son père, Wilhelm IV. von Jülich, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Ricarda von Geldern, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Johann von Arenberg en 1269, à Jülich, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1286, à Aremberg, Landkreis Ahrweiler, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.Aachen, Aachener Reich, Holy Roman Empir: Aachen, Aachener Reich, Heiliges Römisches Reich
de.lifeSummary: Als Katharina von Jülich 1255 in Jülich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Wilhelm IV. von Jülich 40 und ihre Mutter Ricarda von Geldern 34. Sie hat 1269 in Jülich, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland Johann von Arenberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1286 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Aremberg, Landkreis Ahrweiler, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katharina von Jülich è nata il nel 1255 nel Jülich, sua padre, Wilhelm IV. von Jülich, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Ricarda von Geldern, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Johann von Arenberg nel 1269, nel Jülich, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1286, nel Aremberg, Landkreis Ahrweiler, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katharina von Jülichが1255年にジuリチで生まれた時，父Wilhelm IV. von Jülichは40歳，母Ricarda von Geldernは34歳であった。1269年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンドuレンジuリチでJohann von Arenbergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1286年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス アールウエイラーアレンバーグで31歳で死去した。

ko.Aachen, Aachener Reich, Holy Roman Empir: 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 아악헨어 라이치 아악헨
ko.lifeSummary: Katharina von Jülich(이)가 1255년 ju리치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Wilhelm IV. von Jülich(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ricarda von Geldern(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1269년 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 드u런 ju리치에서 Johann von Arenberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1286년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 아h위러 애렘버그에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katharina von Jülich nasceu em 1255, em Jülich, seu pai, Wilhelm IV. von Jülich, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Ricarda von Geldern, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Johann von Arenberg em 1269, em Jülich, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1286, em Aremberg, Landkreis Ahrweiler, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 31 anos.

ru.Aachen, Aachener Reich, Holy Roman Empir: аачэн, аачэнир раич, хилигесь рoмищесь раич
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katharina von Jülich родилась в 1255 г. в местности джuлич, её отцу по имени Wilhelm IV. von Jülich было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Ricarda von Geldern, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Johann von Arenberg в 1269 г. в местности джuлич, дuрен, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1286 г. в местности арембирг, ландкрис ахрвилир, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 31 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katharina von Jülich nació en 1255, en Jülich, su papá, Wilhelm IV. von Jülich, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Ricarda von Geldern, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Johann von Arenberg en 1269, en Jülich, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1286, en Aremberg, Landkreis Ahrweiler, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 31 años.
